subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward the direction of thy Lord's mercy! Piety and righteousness are a mighty armor and the impregnable fortress of God, and until this essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بشطر رحمت رب عزت تقوی و صلاح درع متین و حصن حصین الهیست و تا این جوهر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
